response:
Subject: Clarification Regarding Current Machine Vision Setup

Dear [Recipient's Name],

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.

I believe there may be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision setup. Our device is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor used in this device is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor (I have attached the technical data to this email).

Please refer to the "FL3-U3-Technical-Reference" PDF file and look at page 18 for the detailed datasheet. For information on Quantum Efficiency, please check page 13 of the "FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging" PDF file.

I will review the files and manuals more carefully and keep you informed.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
